hypothesis: If a conditional variational autoencoder trained on Li–Si–X crystal graph embeddings and conditioned on Si and Li presence, target capacity >1500 mAh/g, and a large stable Li+ channel radius is used with CAVD screening and CHGNet relaxation, then it will generate novel silicon-based anode materials that, after relaxation, exhibit >1500 mAh/g capacity and retain a nearly constant Li+ migration channel radius between charged and discharged states.
